---
title: "Selected for the 100k-Clima Fellowship at Penn State University"
description: "Selected for the 100k-Clima Fellowship at Penn State University, supporting research and exchange on climate and energy."
date: "2024-09-01"
categories: [news]
image: "/files/images/news/fellowship.png"
---

I was selected for the **100k-Clima Fellowship** at Penn State University, a program supporting research collaboration and academic exchange on climate and energy topics.
